creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
I'm inclined to drop support for i386 for h2o & h2o-devel.

Let's wait on https://github.com/h2o/h2o/issues/3289
before moving ahead.

https://git.sr.ht/~dch/ports/commit/5d1761206470aa9df30cfd82bbf70664038c6761.patch

is the next planned release, & I'm running a test build
of that atm.

Upstream h2o project has moved to a rolling commit model and
I don't think there's interest/effort in making this work
on 32-bit systems there.

https://repology.org/project/h2o/versions

According to repology, FreeBSD is the only platform with
pre-built packages for the -devel branch, so I can't see
if anybody else has dealt with this specific issue already.
